title: Show Everything (Not Grouped by Due Date) in My Work on Mobile
excerpt: It would be useful for the “My Work” portion of the mobile application have an option to display all tasks in one single view, instead of only sorting by due date. The “My Work” page on desktop already provides a similar…

posts.author: mgstrick (mady.stricker@gmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be useful for the “My Work” portion of the mobile application have an option to display all tasks in one single view, instead of only sorting by due date. The “My Work” page on desktop already provides a similar view by default.
